description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk featuring a dark wood or laminate top and a sturdy base. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid cabinet with three visible drawers, while the right side is held up by two metallic cylindrical legs. The desk's surface is smooth and spacious, suitable for writing, working, or placing electronic devices. The color contrast between the dark top and the light gray base gives it a contemporary look. The overall construction appears robust, with clean lines and a minimalist design.
description: A modern desk with a dark wood top, left-side drawer cabinet, and right-side metal legs, offering a sleek and functional workspace.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the desk, the left-side cabinet with drawers, and the right-side metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid cabinet with drawers and the thickness of the desk top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cabinet and the open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the metal legs and the depth of the desk top.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the open leg space and visible drawers on the left, intended for sitting and working; the back is flat and featureless.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk in an office setting
